use_cases: Website footer with scroll-triggered cinematic background animations and breathing effects
Landing page footer with marquee text and heartbeat pulse animations for visual impact
Product footer section featuring theme-adaptive pill buttons with hover states
ai_summary: A cinematic footer component featuring GSAP ScrollTrigger animations including breathing, marquee, and heartbeat effects. Uses Plus Jakarta Sans typography with theme-adaptive CSS variables for seamless dark/light mode integration. The footer includes styled pill buttons with sophisticated hover states and inset shadows, creating an immersive visual experience suitable for modern SaaS landing pages.
